---
title: "SmoothTest"
generated: true
description: "Per-smooth approximate-significance test (Wood, 2013; integer-rank)."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.gam`](../nitrix-stats-gam.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:SmoothTest -->
```python
class SmoothTest(NamedTuple)
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:SmoothTest -->
Per-smooth approximate-significance test (Wood, 2013; integer-rank).

Each field is `(V, m)` -- one column per smooth (in `smooths` order),
one row per element.  `stat` is the test statistic $T_r$, `rank`
its reference degrees of freedom, `p_value` the upper-tail p-value
($\chi^2$ for a fixed-dispersion family, $F$ with
$N - \text{edf}_{\text{total}}$ denominator degrees of freedom
otherwise), and `edf` the smooth's effective degrees of freedom (the
`mgcv::summary.gam` "edf" column).
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
